title: trachymene elachocarpa
intro: Trachymene elachocarpa, also known as the native Australian plant, is a species of flowering plant in the carrot family (Apiaceae). Trachymene elachocarpa has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antiseptic. The health benefits of the plant include its potential to relieve pain, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of Trachymene elachocarpa include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
